positive: A symmetrical, repeating pattern design featuring luminous cosmic elements intertwined with elegant stylized flora. The composition should be highly contrasted, utilizing deep indigo, ethereal violet, and accents of neon cyan and pale gold. Focus on negative space and clean, thick silhouettes of crescent moons, stylized constellations (like the Archer and Ursa Major), and tropical leaves (monstera, palm fronds). The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and celestial etching, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Central composition, high contrast, repeating tessellation pattern, volumetric lighting, hyper-detailed.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, blurred, fuzzy, grainy, artifact, low quality, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, oversaturation, muted colors
